args.code: (() => { const save = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('farm_game_save_v1') || '{}'); return JSON.stringify({ speed: localStorage.getItem('farm_game_speed'), autoPlay: save.autoPlayEnabled, lastSave: save.lastSaveTimestamp, milestones: save.milestones, currentEvent: save.currentEvent, gameLoop: typeof gameLoop !== 'undefined', timeHours: typeof time !== 'undefined' ? time : null, screen: typeof currentScreen !== 'undefined' ? currentScreen : null }); })()
